api: Open Data DC Master Address Repository (MAR 2) API v2.2 (https://datagate.dc.gov/mar/open/api/v2.2)
scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (locations, units, ssls); MAR 2 is a public read-only lookup API with no mutation surface, so there are no write endpoints in or out of scope
